atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the back pain as shifting

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the back pain has been present for the last four days

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain was initially intermittent

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is now constant

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain started on his right side

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain has moved to his left side

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain comes and goes

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain has been constant for the last 48 hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking Tylenol

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes Tylenol

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation on the right-hand side

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness in the abdomen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports muscle aches

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor suspects a recurrence of kidney stones.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are most consistent with back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor prescribes Ultram 50 milligrams as needed every six hours for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders a refill of protonix 40 milligrams daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders a CT scan without contrast of the abdomen and pelvis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders follow up in four weeks if symptoms persist.
